Token auth method for token lifecycle management
Creates a new token. Certain options are only available when called by a root token. If used via the /auth/token/create/orphan endpoint, a root or sudo token is not required.

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Vault Auth Methods API

description.content:
APIs for authentication methods in HashiCorp Vault including Token, AppRole, Kubernetes, LDAP, JWT/OIDC, GitHub, Userpass, and AWS auth methods. These endpoints handle user and machine authentication to obtain Vault tokens.

Contact Support:
 Name: HashiCorp Support
 Email: support@hashicorp.com
